Resilience._comment: Standard HTTP resilience handler tuning (applied to every HttpClient via ServiceDefaults). All values in seconds.

Web._comment: WebTool (web_fetch) tunables. TimeoutSeconds = HttpClient timeout; MaxResponseLength = chars before truncation.

ToolApproval._comment: How long the runtime waits for the user to click Approve/Deny on the tool-approval card before auto-denying. 0 or negative = wait indefinitely.

Model._comment: Provider options: ollama, foundry-local, azure-openai. Recommended Ollama models: gemma4:e2b (best tool-use, default), llama3.2, gemma4:e4b, phi4. Azure OpenAI: set Model:Endpoint + Model:ApiKey (api-key mode) or Model:AuthMode=integrated. Fallbacks: ordered list of provider names to try when the primary fails, e.g. ["foundry-local", "ollama"]

Slack._comment: Configuration for Slack proactive message delivery. EndpointUrl: Slack API endpoint (e.g., https://slack.com/api/chat.postMessage). BotToken: Bot User OAuth Token (xoxb-...). Timeout: HTTP request timeout in seconds (default: 10).

OpenClawNet._comment: Core OpenClawNet configuration. StorageDir: Base directory for agent output storage (null = platform default). Can be overridden via OPENCLAW_STORAGE_DIR environment variable.

SkillsImport._comment: K-4 — External skill import allowlist. Repositories not in AllowedRepos are rejected with HTTP 403 + Reason=RepoNotAllowed. PreviewTtlSeconds bounds the in-memory preview cache (default 5 min).

Dashboard._comment: S4 — External dashboard publisher configuration. BaseUrl: Dashboard API endpoint. ApiKey: Bearer token for authentication. TimeoutSeconds: HTTP request timeout.

GoogleWorkspace._comment: S5 — Google Workspace (Gmail + Calendar) OAuth configuration. ClientId/ClientSecret: from Google Cloud Console (use user-secrets for values). RedirectUri: OAuth callback URL. Scopes: gmail.readonly, calendar.events for minimal access.
